entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Dry season food legume (Cicer arietinum L.) grown on residual soil moisture

entities.name: MOISTURE STRESS
entities.description: Stress experienced by crops due to lack of water, often occurring as terminal drought

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT
entities.description: Moisture stress occurring towards the end of the crop season

entities.name: HEAT STRESS
entities.description: Stress faced at the reproductive stage, often due to delayed sowing

entities.name: EARLY MATURITY
entities.description: A trait developed to improve adaptation to abiotic stresses

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: General ability of a crop to withstand non-biological stresses

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: Ability of a crop to maintain productivity under moisture stress

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: Measure of productivity used as a selection criterion for drought tolerance

entities.name: POD SET
entities.description: Measure of productivity used as a selection criterion for heat tolerance

entities.name: HEAT TOLERANCE
entities.description: Ability of a crop to maintain productivity under heat stress

entities.name: QTL-HOTSPOT
entities.description: A genomic region controlling several drought tolerance-related traits

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED BACKCROSSING
entities.description: A breeding method used to introgress specific genomic regions like QTL-hotspots

entities.name: MULTIPARENT ADVANCED GENERATION INTERCROSS
entities.description: A breeding approach used to enhance genetic recombination and stress tolerance

entities.name: GENETIC RECOMBINATION
entities.description: The process of rearranging genetic material, enhanced by the MAGIC approach
